title: 🚨 Deleted item alerts - Never Miss Critical Deletions Again 🚨
excerpt: The Problem Every Admin Faces: You’re managing dozens of boards with hundreds of items. Someone deletes something important, and you only find out when a team member asks “Where did that project go?” Sure, it’s logged in…

posts.author: NikolaMastilovic (Nikola Mastilovic (SpicyTab))
posts.cookedHtml:
The Problem Every Admin Faces: You’re managing dozens of boards with hundreds of items. Someone deletes something important, and you only find out when a team member asks “Where did that project go?” Sure, it’s logged in the activity feed, but who has time to constantly monitor logs?

Introducing Deleted Item Alerts Finally, a proactive solution that keeps you in the loop without drowning you in notifications.

Smart, Customizable Monitoring:

  • Set your own rules - Get alerts only for specific boards, item types, users, or other conditions you define
  • Catch mistakes fast - Accidental deletions happen. Now you’ll know in seconds, not days
  • Spot suspicious patterns - Unusual deletion activity gets flagged immediately
  • Zero noise - Only get notified when something actually needs your attention

Prevention Over Detection: This isn’t just about knowing what happened - it’s about preventing small mistakes from becoming big problems. Whether it’s an accidental click or unauthorized changes, you’re covered.

Perfect for: Workspace admins managing multiple boards
Project managers overseeing critical workflows
Teams handling sensitive or compliance-related data
Anyone tired of playing detective in activity logs
